title: Instrumental Project
description: This is a datapack that adds a way to import your own music into the game and play it with his own play system
body:
A Musical datapack

**📖 What is this datapack?**
This is a datapack that adds a new system of music that allows you add your custom songs using a partiture, and playing it with a instrument

**✅ Features:**
- You can create new items like an instrument and a partiture for beggin in the world of music

- A completely new music system to import your own songs
![importer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2963191a977dc0064bacf237a84d2b8bb25a8097.png)
![loader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8694b35349a765b1b4fb7ee9082d3f39058507f_0.webp)

  
- You can press your quick actions for a mini-tutorial
![Tutorial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7195a68a0398f60148a5370f117f59fb509bc5.png)
